titleStmt.title: SII 15.213: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 213. (B.K. No. 187 of 1928-29.) AṆṆIGĒRI, NAVALGUND TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a pillar to the left of the southern entrance (outer side) the Amṛitēśvara temple.

This is dated the 7th regnal year of the king, Piṅgaḷa, Mārgaśira-puṇṇami, Monday, Śaṅkramaṇa, corresponding to 1197 A.D., November 26, the Saṅkramaṇa being Dhanus. The weekday, however, was Wednesday.
It records a gift of land to the god Svayaṁbhu-Amṛitēśvara of the rājadhānipaṭṭaṇa Aṇṇigeṟe, by Siṅgayya-daṇṇāyaka, son-in-law of Kumāra Lakshmīdharadaṇḍanātha.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamū
vē . dhritasanmūḷabaḷasamagranayasaṁghaṭṭamahīcakradoḷu tatavastuprada
sēbyavibhava ballāḷabhōmīśvarō¨rjjitanī kaṭakarājyakalpataru bhāsva nnityapu
dayāmṛtade ko¨rbbidudaltu pallavisugācaṁdrā¨rkkatāraṁbaraṁ . śaraṇā yāta¨rgge
yuddhāvaniyoḷadiradānta¨rgga kāṁtārakadaṁbakkerada[¨rttā]¨rttibrajakkaṁbudhi pavanasuta gōmi
naṁ bhāskaraputraṁ rakṣisalu saṁharisalolisalīyalke tāneṁbinaṁ vistarisi¨rddanā
kṣitipatitanayaṁ vīraballāḷadēvaṁ . tatpādapadmōpajīvi
paribudhapēśala bhānusthira putra
gadrīśvara ballāḷō¨rvvīpāḷapravarakaṁṭakanū¨rjjita
nirupamamahimaṁ lakṣmadaṁḍādhināthaṁ yōgaṁdharayuktiyiṁ
dūre diṭaṁ kāmaṁdakaṁ nītiyiṁ dore vācaspati buddhiyiṁde dore mudrārākṣasaṁ ca
¨rbbeyiṁ dore cāṇakyanupāyadiṁdenisuvaṁ nānākaḷāṁbōdhi lakṣmī
dharadaṇḍanāthanaḷiyaṁ daṇḍādhipaṁ siṁgaṇa . svasti śrīmatu yādavanā
rāyaṇa bhujabaḷapratāpa hoysaṇacakrava¨rtti vīraballāḷadēvava
¨rṣada 7 neya piṁgaḷa saṁvatsarada mā¨rggasira suddha puṇnami sōmavāra byatīpā
ta saṁkrama(ha)ṇa puṇyatathiyoḷu śrīmadrājadhāni paṭṭaṇavaṇni
geṟeya sakaḷakaḷāsāṁnidhya dakṣiṇavāraṇāsi śrī śvayaṁbhu di
byaliṁgaṁ śrīmadamṛtēśvaradēva¨rgge śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ kumāra lakhmīdēvadaṇnā
yakaraḷiya siṁgayyadaṇnāyakaru biṭṭa dha¨rmmavanteṁdaḍe dēvara kēriya ca
tussīmeya sīyabāradiṁdoḷage

lli vidyāvantaralli yāvanō¨rbanadhikāriyaputrikadhana drōhadhana goṁ
ḍaranyāyavaṁ māḍidaradu hesariṭṭa
taṁdaḍe śrīgaṁge vāraṇāsi kurukṣētradalli svahastadiṁ gōbāhmaṇara koṁda mahā
pātakavakkuṁ bojaṁgaru
dha¨rmmavanāvanāḷvara sugaḷuṁ triva¨rggaṁgaḷuṁ samayaṁgaḷuṁ
suvaru . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ saṣṭivaru .
Digital edition of SII 15.213 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
